headline: Is It Too Late To Consider AutoZone (AZO) After Strong Multi Year Share Price Run
summary: If you are wondering whether AutoZone's share price still reflects good value after a strong multi year run, it helps to step back and look at what the current market price might be implying. The stock last closed at US$3,882.47, with returns of 1.4% over 7 days, 4.8% over 30 days, 17.5% year to date and 11.6% over 1 year. The 3 year and 5 year returns sit at 54.1% and 212.8% respectively. Recent news coverage has focused on AutoZone's position in the US auto parts retail space and how the...
